reasoning: The market probability was already extremely low (7%) on November 13, 2025. Since then, Google released the Gemini 3 series (on or around Nov 18-20), which reportedly debuted at #1 on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena with a record-setting Elo (around 1487), beating GPT-5.1 and Grok 4.1. Given that OpenAI clearly pushed an update recently (GPT-5.1) and was just surpassed, it is highly unlikely they will launch another major frontier model before the end of the year, especially with only 5 weeks remaining and the holidays approaching. Furthermore, new models typically require several days to gather enough votes to shed their 'preview' status and officially rank on the leaderboard. Finally, in the unlikely event of an exact Elo tie on December 31, the alphabetical tie-breaker favors 'Google' over 'OpenAI'. Thus, the probability of OpenAI holding the #1 position by December 31, 2025, has dropped even further from the November 13 baseline and is estimated at ~4%.
